[[Goroth Alpha]] or '''K'Len''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Goroth system/Legends|Goroth system]].

==Description==
Goroth Alpha was a red-orange main-sequence star. Its [[Gorothite/Legends|Gorothite]] name was ''K'Len'' ("the Mother"), although most commonly it was just called "the sun". Size, mass, radiation output, temperature and gravity were typical for a star of this type.<ref name="GSE" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-01-XX -->''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
